memory.summary: I planned to finish analysis then read, but a friend invited me to lunch. With low energy and high stress, I must prioritize rest over the plan.
The missing task 'assignment_A' confirms my plan to skip it was correct. With low energy and high stress, resting is the only viable option.
After two hours of progress, my friend's group order is likely ready. With only moderate stress and decent energy, I can briefly check the status before resting.
The missing task 'assignment_A' confirms I should rest, but my friend's order is ready to check briefly before prioritizing sleep.
I spent two hours on the analysis section, improving progress from 0.58 to 0.72, but it remains incomplete as the deadline is approaching within an hour.
I worked two hours on the analysis section, raising progress to 0.83, but the deadline at 18:00 has passed with the task still unfinished.
I spent 2 hours improving assignment progress to 0.90, but missed the reading deadline at 20:00 with zero completion. My high stress and sleep debt confirm I cannot continue working effectively.
I missed the reading deadline with zero completion and now cannot find task 'assignment_A'. My high stress and sleep debt prevent further effective work.
I waited at 21:30 after missing multiple deadlines and feeling high stress. I must stop working now to recover before attempting again.
I cannot find 'assignment_A' after missing the reading deadline. My high stress and sleep debt confirm I must stop working immediately to recover.
After 2 hours of work, progress is minimal (0.06). With high stress and sleep debt, I must continue resting before attempting again.
Since 'assignment_A' no longer exists, I can finally stop working entirely. My high stress and sleep debt confirm it is time to rest completely.
